title: Terrain Texture Atlas
description: The terrain_texture.json file defines the texture atlas for block textures. It maps texture names to texture file paths, allowing blocks to reference textures by name. Located at textures/terrain_texture.json in resource packs.

resource_pack_name.title: Resource Pack Name
resource_pack_name.description: The name of the resource pack this atlas belongs to.

texture_name.title: Texture Name
texture_name.description: The name of the texture atlas. Typically 'atlas.terrain' for block textures.

padding.title: Padding
padding.description: The padding in pixels between textures in the atlas to prevent bleeding.

num_mip_levels.title: Number of Mip Levels
num_mip_levels.description: The number of mipmap levels to generate for the atlas.

texture_data.title: Texture Data
texture_data.description:
A collection of texture definitions keyed by texture name. Each entry maps a texture name to its source file(s).

Properties:
• textures (string[])
• overlay_color (string)

textures.title: Textures
textures.description: Array of texture file paths. Multiple paths can be provided for variants (used with aux values in older versions).

overlay_color.title: Overlay Color
overlay_color.description: A color to overlay on top of the texture, specified as a hex color code.
